description: Form builders, survey tools, and feedback widgets for collecting structured input from users.

entries.name: Tally
entries.summary: Notion-like form builder with unlimited free forms and responses, no watermark on the free tier.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited forms and submissions free, no branding required.
entries.paidFrom: Pro plan from $29/month for advanced logic/integrations.

entries.name: Typeform
entries.summary: Conversational, one-question-at-a-time forms with polished design and branching logic.

entries.name: Google Forms
entries.summary: Free, simple form/survey builder integrated with Google Sheets for response collection.
entries.freeTier: Completely free with a Google account, unlimited forms and responses.

entries.name: Formspree
entries.summary: Backend-as-a-service for HTML forms — handles submissions, spam filtering, and email notifications without server code.

entries.name: Getform
entries.summary: Form endpoint service for static sites and JAMstack apps, with spam filtering and file upload support.

entries.name: Canny
entries.summary: Feature request and feedback board for product teams to collect, prioritize, and close the loop with users.
entries.freeTier: Starter plan free for small teams with limited tracked users.

entries.name: Hotjar
entries.summary: Heatmaps, session recordings, and on-site surveys for understanding user behavior.
entries.freeTier: Basic plan free with limited daily sessions tracked.

entries.name: SurveyMonkey
entries.summary: Established survey platform with templates, logic branching, and analysis tools.
entries.freeTier: Free plan: up to 10 questions and 25 responses per survey.
